---
title: "Water Quality Maps"
format: 
  html: 
    toc: true
---

::: {.column-margin}
:::

# Water sampling

San Roque Lake.

```{r}
#| eval: true
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| column: screen-inset
library(terra)
library(leaflet)
library(leafem)
library(leaflet.extras)
library(leafpop)
library(tidyverse)

# datos de muestreo
p_tbl <- tibble(
  x = c(-64.469365, -64.468102, -64.484772),
  y = c(-31.376373, -31.366567, -31.393680),
  cla = c(10, 20, 30),
  ciano = c(1, 2, 3),
  img = paste0("img/muestreos/fig", 1:3, ".jpg"),
  sitio = paste0("P", 1:3)
)

# convierto a vector
p <- vect(p_tbl, geom = c("x", "y"), crs = "EPSG:4326")

# centro del Lago, para ubicar el mapa
centro_lng <- -64.465986
centro_lat <- -31.374978

# mapa
leaflet(p, height = 600) |>
  setView(
    lng = centro_lng,
    lat = centro_lat,
    zoom = 13
  ) |>
  addTiles(group = "OSM (default)") |>
  addProviderTiles(
    providers$CartoDB.Positron,
    group = "Positron (minimal)",
    options = providerTileOptions(noWrap = TRUE)
  ) |>
  addProviderTiles(
    providers$Esri.WorldImagery,
    group = "World Imagery (satellite)",
    options = providerTileOptions(noWrap = TRUE)
  ) |>
  addMarkers(
    label = ~sitio,
    popup = popupTable(
      select(p_tbl, sitio, cla, ciano),
      row.numbers = FALSE,
      feature.id = FALSE,
      className = "style='font-size: 5em;'"
    ),
    group = "grupo",
    icon = icons(
      iconUrl = "https://api.iconify.design/famicons/pin-sharp.svg?height=30&color=%23f86501"
    )
  ) |>
  addPopupImages(p$img, tooltip = FALSE, group = "grupo", width = 400) |>
  addLayersControl(
    baseGroups = c(
      "OSM (default)",
      "Positron (minimal)",
      "World Imagery (satellite)"
    ),
    overlayGroups = "grupo",
    options = layersControlOptions(collapsed = TRUE)
  ) |>
  addResetMapButton() |>
  addFullscreenControl(position = "bottomright")
```

# Methodology

- Chlorophyll-a
- Cyanobacteria
